final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] in,
    output reg [3:0] count_result,  // Change to reg because we are driving it in an always block
    output reg overflow     // Change to reg because we are driving it in an always block
);always @(*) begin
    if (in == 4'b1111) begin
        count_result = 4'b0000;        // Assign temp_out to count_result directly
        overflow = 1;
    end
    else begin
        count_result = in + 1;         // Assign the incremented value directly to count_result
        overflow = 0;
    end
end

endmodule
